title: Shadow Pin Activity Analytics
summary: Admin analytics for Shadow Pin are live with refreshed tables, cleaner charts, and a required database-backed update.

sections.heading: Admin Analytics
items: Admins and sub-admins can review Shadow Pin visits, active time, post activity, hearts, shares, edits, deletes, and weighted activity scores.
The analytics page now loads as a lighter admin-only panel with cleaner spreadsheet rows and chart summaries.
Existing Shadow Pin posts, categories, and hearts have been backfilled into the analytics data.

sections.heading: Update Required
items: Restarting the app makes sure the new analytics code and database functions are loaded together.
The update prompt will ask older app sessions to refresh before continuing.
